title: Crispy Australian Pork Belly
description: A mouth-watering dish featuring tender pork belly, crispy skin, and a touch of peppery flavor. This recipe is perfect for a special occasion dinner.
instructions: Score the fat layer on the pork belly in a crisscross pattern.
Rub the pork belly with peppery and australian spice blends.
Place the pork belly on a baking sheet lined with aluminum foil.
Roast the pork belly in the preheated oven for 20 minutes per kilogram.
Remove the pork belly from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Place the crisp slices on a baking sheet and bake for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
Slice the pork belly into thick strips and serve with the crispy slices on top.
Garnish with additional peppery and australian seasoning, if desired.
